header.exit_drill_tooltip: Exit subgraph — back to main cosmos

search.placeholder: Search nodes by name, summary, or tags…
search.semantic_tooltip: Semantic search arrives in a later version — needs an embedding model.

info.empty: Click a node or layer to inspect it here. Open the TOUR tab for perspective tours.
info.project_open_root_hint: Opens the source folder in your preferred editor. Subsequent source-chip clicks will activate in the same window.
info.project_no_root_hint: Click any node to see its sources. This cosmos has no on-disk root declared — sources may point to web URLs, transcripts, or scattered files.

files.empty: No file references in this cosmos yet.

tour.empty: This cosmos has no curated tours yet. Ask the agent to add one — either a Project Tour (one canonical reading path) or Perspectives (variant walks framed by a design lens).
tour.overall_subtitle_one: {{count}} step · the canonical reading path through this cosmos
tour.overall_subtitle_other: {{count}} steps · the canonical reading path through this cosmos
tour.perspectives_subtitle_one: {{count}} variant tour · walk the same cosmos through a specific design lens. Each one is grounded in the nodes it visits.
tour.perspectives_subtitle_other: {{count}} variant tours · walk the same cosmos through a specific design lens. Each one is grounded in the nodes it visits.

drills.title: Drills
drills.subtitle: Your drill-down history. Click any entry to navigate the canvas into its subgraph.
drills.empty: No drills yet. Select one or more nodes on the canvas (shift+click to pick multiple), then click Drill into N nodes →. The agent will generate a focused subgraph for your question.

drill_modal.hint: The agent will generate a focused subgraph for these anchors and send back a locator when ready.
drill_modal.default_prompt_one: Please drill deeper into this node: {{anchors}}. Return a focused subgraph.
drill_modal.default_prompt_other: Please drill deeper into the relationship between these nodes: {{anchors}}. Return a focused subgraph.

canvas.isolate_tooltip: Isolate selection on a clean canvas

help_modal.title: Keyboard shortcuts
help_modal.shortcut_tour_tab: Open perspective tours — variant walks framed by a design lens
help_modal.shortcut_escape: Close modal • end tour • clear selection

onboarding.step1_body: Cosmos projects any content into a structured graph — code, prose, research, business workflows. This first screen is a *bootstrap*: pneuma-skills projecting itself.
onboarding.step2_body: Two navigation levels share the same canvas. Project shows one card per layer; click a card to drop into Detail, which renders every node inside that layer. Toggle with P or the LEVEL switch in the sidebar.
onboarding.step3_body: The right panel has three tabs. INFO shows whatever you've selected. FILES lists every node grouped by layer. TOUR walks a curated reading path with Prev / Next stepping — a great first visit if you're new.
onboarding.step4_body: Top strip has fuzzy search (any name, summary, tag — top hits live-update) and per-category chips (CODE, DOCS, …) to dim what you don't want to see right now.
onboarding.step5_body: When a cosmos has agent-discovered design lenses, the TOUR tab grows extra entries below the main Project Tour. Each one is a variant walk — same cosmos, but you're reading it through a specific question: 'where does the system maintain a feedback loop?', 'where do v0.2 and v0.3 abstractions collide?'. Pick one to see its through-line.

empty_state.title: No cosmos yet
empty_state.body: Drop content into the workspace — code, prose, research, anything — and ask the agent to project it. The cosmos will appear here.
